title: James Brown
compiled_truth: James Brown is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-03-14 to 2002-03-29), James Brown sent 5 and received 14 emails, totalling 19 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (5), [Thomas Bauer](people/thomas-bauer) (4), [Ted Murphy](people/ted-murphy) (4), [Brenda Herod](people/brenda-herod) (3), [Vladimir Gorny](people/vladimir-gorny) (2).
